articles.title: Macy's store revamp shows progress, but company expects sales to fall this year
articles.summary: Macy's posted solid fourth-quarter results as it tries to revamp some stores and close others.

articles.title: Disney embarks on new chapter as Josh D'Amaro takes over as CEO
articles.summary: Bob Iger is stepping aside as Josh D'Amaro, who previously served as chairman of Disney's experiences division, takes over as CEO.

articles.title: FDA approves psoriasis pill from J&J that rivals shots Tremfya, Skyrizi
articles.summary: Johnson & Johnson said the U.S. Food and Drug Administration approved its once-daily psoriasis pill, the first oral option to rival best-selling shots.

articles.title: Lululemon reports weak guidance as proxy battle, tariffs weigh on bottom line
articles.summary: Lululemon topped fourth-quarter estimates but gave weaker-than-expected sales and earnings forecasts for 2026.

articles.title: Airlines raise revenue guidance despite rising fuel costs, citing growth in demand
articles.summary: CEO Ed Bastian told CNBC's Phil LeBeau that Delta had taken a $400 million fuel hit in the quarter, but that demand has been "really, really great."

articles.title: Arizona charges Kalshi with criminal misdemeanors, alleging it's an illegal gambling operation
articles.summary: The Arizona charges are the first criminal charges to have been filed against Kalshi, though the company is embroiled in multiple lawsuits over its predictions platform.

articles.title: Nissan joins Toyota, Honda in plans to export U.S. cars to Japan
articles.summary: Nissan will export the Murano SUV built in Smyrna, Tennessee, beginning early next year. It marks the first American-made Nissan sold in Japan since the 1990s.

Przyjrzeliśmy się prognozom instytucji świata finansów dla naszego kraju i widać, czego najbardziej obawiają się ekonomiści. Poza zasięgiem tych obaw jest na razie wzrost gospodarczy.

articles.title: Kurs JPY/PLN 20 marca 2026 r.
articles.summary: Poznaj kurs japońskiego jena na dzień 20 marca 2026. Jen jest jedną z głównych walut rezerwowych świata, dlatego ma znaczenie dla światowej gospodarki. Jednak jego kurs interesuje także podróżujących do Japonii w celach turystycznych. Z tego powodu pokazujemy obecny kurs waluty, jak też zmiany kursu jena w perspektywie dziennej i tygodniowej.

articles.title: Kurs EUR/PLN 20 marca 2026 r.
articles.summary: Bieżący kurs waluty euro z dnia 20 marca 2026 z godziny 7 rano oraz zmiany kursu dzień do dnia i tydzień do tygodnia. Jak się zmienił kurs w tym okresie i czy warto dziś wymieniać złotówki na euro? Aktualny kurs euro interesuje turystów, ale przede wszystkim przedsiębiorców, którzy zajmują się importem i eksportem usług oraz towarów. Wczoraj kurs euro wynosił: 4,2680 zł

articles.title: Kurs USD/PLN 20 marca 2026 r.
articles.summary: Oto aktualny kurs waluty USD na dzień 20 marca 2026. Dolar jest jedną z głównych walut, w których przeprowadzane są transakcje na światowych rynkach. Od jego ceny zależą surowce takie jak ropa, mające wpływ na nasze codzienne życie. Z tego powodu warto wiedzieć, po ile obecnie można wymienić amerykańską walutę oraz jak zmienia się wartość dolara w dłuższej perspektywie. Wczoraj kurs USD wynosił 3,

articles.title: This is Jeff Bezos’s plan to rival Elon Musk in the race for space-based data centers
articles.summary: Blue Origin plans to launch an up-to-51,600-satellite constellation called ‘Project Sunrise’ to power AI.

articles.title: The Trump administration just greenlit the TV megamerger at the center of Jimmy Kimmel’s suspension. It still may not be legal.
articles.summary: Eight state attorneys general have filed an antitrust suit against the $6.2 billion Nexstar-Tegna merger, which the Trump administration backed after Nexstar moved to suspend Kimmel’s show.

articles.title: Planet Labs’ stock soars as the satellite company says AI will unlock more business
articles.summary: The company, a Google partner, delivered record revenue for its latest fiscal year, reflecting growing demand for satellite imagery.

articles.title: FedEx is upbeat about shipping demand despite surging fuel costs — and the stock is rallying
articles.summary: Shares of FedEx rose in extended trading Thursday after the package-delivery giant said it expected slightly better sales and profits for this year, even as the Iran war threatens larger shipping disruptions and drives fuel prices higher.

articles.title: ‘We’re living the simple life’: I was a fisherman and my wife was a nurse. We retired with $6 million. Here’s how we did it.
articles.summary: “It probably makes little sense, given our lifestyle, to obsess over retirement accounts.”

articles.title: ‘Six figures are missing’: My aunt’s attorney took over her bank account. Two random doctors declared her incompetent. How do I fix this?
articles.summary: “The attorney found two doctors — one who briefly spoke to her and signed off, and another who never saw her and simply stamped the form.”

articles.title: Mortgage rates surge to highest since September, hitting spring housing market
articles.summary: Mortgage rates jumped to a seven-month high Friday as war in Iran pushed bond yields higher.
